title: POPRUN 2026 Diary Week to View A5+ 17.5x21.5 cm - Vertical Weekly Planner with 1/2 Hourly Appointments, Monthly Tabs, 100 gsm Paper, PU Leather Softcover, Sunday Start - Brown
features: 12-MONTH APPOINTMENT PLANNER: This POPORUN weekly planner can be used for up to 12 months (from January 2026 to December 2026). Whether you want to record your daily appointments or organise your everyday life, this calendar is a good choice.
FAST SEARCH FUNCTION: The monthly tabs allow you to quickly browse and find the current day. Plus, tear-off corners and bookmark ribbons are added to mark any page of your choice.
WEEKLY PLAN/MONTHLY PLAN: 1 week 2 page weekly calendar provides a complete and clear weekly overview (From Monday to Sunday). Each monthly plan includes a monthly overview and a notes section.

EXTRA PAGES - This 2026 weekly planner also includes 2026-2027 yearly overview page + 2026-2027 holiday & calendar page + 2 contact pages + 1 password pages + 7 dotted note pages for jotting down your ideas, thoughts or other happy things in detail.
Thick paper: The use of high-quality, acid-free ivory-coloured paper with 100 g/m² makes it silky smooth and ink-resistant, giving you the ultimate writing experience.
